title: Availability, Disaster Recovery, and Validation · Operations Brief: Net Active Modes
summary: Define recovery objectives and prove branch, service, configuration, and site recovery under realistic failures. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net active modes increment in a tested network continuity plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare active-active and active-passive designs including health checks, state, quorum, load, split brain, and failover.
Compare cold, warm, and hot sites by readiness, data, network, staffing, cost, and activation time.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
